feedback.text: Greetings! I would like to express my feedback regarding Digital Fairness Act. Personally, I fully agree with focusing on and addressing the areas of legal uncertainty in terms of consumer protection online. Specifically, I would add another example to the list of bullet-points outlined on page 2, section B. "Objectives and policy options". The example I speak of is the issue of publishers destroying videogames they have already sold to customers. This is an issue that is most definitely in the area of legal uncertainty as of right now, and I believe this is a big enough of an issue to deserve being looked at, alongside the other examples that were already outlined in the document. More detailed explanation of what this issue is, can be found on the European Citizens' Initiative - "Stop Destroying Videogames", which already obtained 1,400,000 signatures, at the following link: https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public
